title: Lesson 263: 雲, 比べる, 呉れる...

items.gloss: to compare; to make a comparison; to compete; to vie
to give; to let (one) have; to do for one; to take the trouble to do; to do to someone's disadvantage
to get dark; to grow dark; to end (of a day, year, season, etc.); to come to an end; to close; to be sunk in (e.g. despair); to be lost in (e.g. thought); to be overcome with
hair; fur; wool; down; plumage; feathers
plan; project; schedule; scheme; program; programme
